scripts.typecheck: cd apps/server && GOCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-mod go test ./... && cd ../.. && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:server:coverage: cd apps/server && GOCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-mod go test ./... -coverprofile=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-server.cover && GOCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-mod go tool cover -func=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-server.cover
scripts.test:server:integration: cd apps/server && INTEGRATION_DATABASE_URL='postgres://phone_levelg:phone_levelg@localhost:5432/phone_levelg?sslmode=disable' INTEGRATION_REDIS_ADDR='localhost:6379' GOCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-mod go test ./... -coverprofile=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-server-integration.cover && GOCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-cache GOMODCACHE=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-go-mod go tool cover -func=/private/tmp/phone-levelg-server-integration.cover
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:openshift && npm run test:deploy-assets && npm run test:native-assets && npm run test:screens
